ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the garment */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the garment image */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the garment */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "back_length" TEXT /* Back length measurement in cm */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the garment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the garment is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier for restocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current total stock in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment ordered */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the garment ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each garment type
Reference to the category of the garment
Reference to the subcategory of the garment
Reference to the supplier of the garment
Unique identifier for each measurement record
Unique identifier for each inventory record
Quantity of the garment in stock
Reference to the location where the garment is stored
Threshold level to trigger a reorder
Reference to the supplier for restocking
